summary: Crystal‑clear matrix recording of a solid, Dew‑heavy show with standout performances and a clean mix
review: The fans rave about the pristine, clean sound that captures every nuance of the band while highlighting an especially powerful The Other One (Dew) and a smooth Truckin’→Miracle transition.  The set flows nicely from an energetic first half into a climactic second set capped by a wonderful Lovelight, despite a few mildly under‑whelming moments like a mellow Cumberland.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers gave 4–5 stars and praised both the musical performance (especially Dew) and the clean recording; only one review was mixed, yielding an overall strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean, crisp mix with balanced instruments; reviewers repeatedly note the sound is very clear and pleasant to listen to.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A solid first set builds good momentum, leading to a second‑set climax centered on Dew and a satisfying Lovelight encore; overall pacing is lively with only minor dips.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar work gets high marks for powerful solos and great tone throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Phil: Phil's bass is present and audible but not highlighted; occasional vocal chants are missing.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboard) shines with a notable piano solo on "River" and tasteful flourishes on several tunes.
